_comment: Documentation sample only. Not a real job. Do not add personal paths, secrets, API keys, or real image paths.
notes: This is a documentation sample, not a real job.
Real .godsandbox/jobs/** files are local-only and gitignored.
portraitRef is a repo-relative path; real paths are never committed.
gen2Bridge: fake means FakeGen2Bridge is used — output is validation-only, not PO-reviewable.
derived-icon lane is not listed here; it depends on resident-sprite-sheet reaching candidate-ready first.
